commands.review_summary:
This PR pins GitHub Actions refs, adds stable-main release closeout and hosted-gate verification, hardens npm postpublish Sigstore/provenance checks, updates release docs/tests, and adds sigstore plus lockfile/shrinkwrap updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for this release/security automation PR; the review is based on diff, source, dependency contract, docs, tests, comments, and live CI state rather than reproducing a user bug.
